_purpose: US-side electrical standards source of truth. Covers all 9 Chapters of NEC 2023 with per-article depth, NEC↔IEC divergence catalogue, and worked examples. Consumed by skills targeting US/North American projects.

edition_history.key_changes_summary: Energy storage Article 706 added; rapid shutdown (690.12) expanded; AFCI coverage broadened
GFCI receptacle requirements expanded (210.8); 215.10 GFP for feeders ≥1000 A; further EV/PV updates
Energy storage updates (706); EV charging refinements (625); receptacle expansion (210.8(F)); broader AFCI coverage

edition_history.status: not yet adopted by any state as of layer build date

state_adoption_map_2026._note: Snapshot. Adoption is set by each state's electrical board / authority having jurisdiction; check current status before issue.
edition_with_state_amendments: CA (California Electrical Code, based on NEC 2023 with state amendments)
MA (Massachusetts Electrical Code, based on NEC 2023 with state amendments)

international_adoption_notes: Mexico — NOM-001-SEDE is based on NEC structure but adapted
Philippines — Philippine Electrical Code (PEC) Part 1 closely follows NEC
Saudi Arabia — partial adoption in some industrial sectors; SBC 401 is local code
Colombia / Costa Rica / Panama — NEC adopted with local amendments

relationship_to_other_standards.NFPA_70E: Workplace electrical safety. Separate standard; not duplicated here. Out of MEP design scope.
relationship_to_other_standards.NFPA_72: National Fire Alarm Code. Separate; this layer covers only Article 760 (Fire Alarm Circuits) within NEC.
relationship_to_other_standards.NFPA_110: Emergency and Standby Power Systems. Referenced by Articles 700/701/702 but not duplicated here.
relationship_to_other_standards.NFPA_111: Stored Electrical Energy. Referenced by Article 706 but not duplicated here.
relationship_to_other_standards.UL_67: Panelboards. Referenced by Article 408 — not duplicated here.
relationship_to_other_standards.UL_891: Switchboards. Referenced by Article 408 — not duplicated here.
relationship_to_other_standards.UL_489: Molded-Case Circuit Breakers. Referenced by Article 240 — not duplicated here.
relationship_to_other_standards.IEC_60364: International electrical-installations standard. Cross-referenced from every NFPA70 article via `related_iec_60364` + `divergence_notes`. See nec-vs-iec-comparison.md for the divergence catalogue.

out_of_scope: NFPA 70E (workplace electrical safety, PPE, arc-flash analysis)
NFPA 72 (fire alarm system design beyond NEC Article 760)
NFPA 110 / 111 (standby power and stored electrical energy beyond NEC 700-706)
State amendments (California, Massachusetts, etc.) — future per-state layers
UL equipment standards referenced by NEC
Pre-1999 Class/Division-only legacy material — Article 505/506 Zone covered for new designs
NEC editions 2017, 2020, 2026 — only 2023 canonical; transition notes in amendments-summary.md
